lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Good day.

lines.speaker: Gamer
lines.text: What's so good about it?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What's eating you.

lines.speaker: Gamer
lines.text: I'm ruined, all because of that stupid cat! It has ruined me.

lines.speaker: Gamer
lines.text: Why did it have to get itself killed? Why?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: *Aside* I think I should leave him alone. He seems a little upset right now.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What are you doing here?

lines.speaker: Gamer
lines.text: Trying to win my shirt back. I lost it last night in a silly bet.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well I hope your luck improves. I doubt it can get any worse.

lines.speaker: Gamer
lines.text: Well I've little left to lose, maybe some more hair and my trousers.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I really think you should try hold on to them.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello.

lines.speaker: Gamer
lines.text: What do you want?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I was just wondering what you were doing here?

lines.speaker: Gamer
lines.text: I ask myself the same question often.

lines.speaker: Gamer
lines.text: What am I doing down here in these pits along with these filthy dregs of society?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: And do you ever come up with an answer?

lines.speaker: Gamer
lines.text: Always.

lines.speaker: Gamer
lines.text: I'm here taking their money, that's what.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello! What's going on here?

lines.speaker: Gamer
lines.text: Just a bit of drinking, a bit of fighting and a few people trying to win big.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Nothing but good clean family fun.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What are you doing?

lines.speaker: Gamer
lines.text: Nothing much. Just keeping myself occupied, placing a couple of wagers here and there.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Are you winning?

lines.speaker: Gamer
lines.text: Yes in the sense that I'm not as bored as I was and no in terms of the number of coins in my purse.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What are you up to?

lines.speaker: Gamer
lines.text: Trying to win back some money.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Is it going well?

lines.speaker: Gamer
lines.text: In every bet there is a fool and a thief and I'm beginning to think that I'm not much of a thief.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What are you doing here?

lines.speaker: Gamer
lines.text: Having fun. It's such a blast I've already won 5 thousand gold coins today, my cat just keeps winning.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So how do these rat pits work?

lines.speaker: Gamer
lines.text: Things work simply in the Ardougne ratpits.

lines.speaker: Gamer
lines.text: If you have a kitten and at least 100 coins you can challenge someone else who also has a kitten and some spare change.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: That sounds simple enough so far.

lines.speaker: Gamer
lines.text: You then agree on a wager. It's rumoured that some ratcatchers can talk to their own cats and give them tactics to aid them.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So then how do you win the challenge?

lines.speaker: Gamer
lines.text: I was just getting to that. Both the challengers' cats are placed inside the arena, and whichever kills 5 rats first wins.

lines.speaker: Gamer
lines.text: It's simple.

lines.speaker: Gamer
lines.text: In Varrock if you have a grown cat and a couple of coins you can challenge someone else who also has a grown cat and some spare change.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: That sounds simple enough so far.

lines.speaker: Gamer
lines.text: You then agree on a wager. It's rumoured that some ratcatchers can talk to their own cats and give them tactics to aid them.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So then how do you win the challenge?

lines.speaker: Gamer
lines.text: I was just getting to that. Both the challengers' cats are placed inside the arena, and whichever kills 7 rats first wins.

lines.speaker: Gamer
lines.text: The Port Sarim pits are quite fussy, no lazy cats allowed in here.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Lazy cats?

lines.speaker: Gamer
lines.text: You know if you neglect a wily cat, it gets fat and lazy? Well, they're not allowed to fight in here, only wily cats.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: That sounds simple enough so far.

lines.speaker: Gamer
lines.text: You then agree on a wager. It's rumoured that some ratcatchers can talk to their own cats and give them tactics to aid them.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So then how do you win the challenge?

lines.speaker: Gamer
lines.text: I was just getting to that. Both the challengers' cats are placed inside the arena, and whichever kills 11 rats first wins.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: That sounds vile and cruel.

lines.speaker: Gamer
lines.text: It's a cruel world and the pits are no exception.

lines.speaker: Gamer
lines.text: Each to their own, I say.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks for your help.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: It sounds a little dangerous for my cat.

lines.speaker: Gamer
lines.text: I agree. Cats have been known to be killed in fights.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh how terrible. Is there nothing you can do to save your cat?

lines.speaker: Gamer
lines.text: Of course there is, you can instruct it to be cautious, and it will leave once it feels as if it is in danger.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh that sounds quite wise.

lines.speaker: Gamer
lines.text: That depends on how you value your cat.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Sorry, I don't follow.

lines.speaker: Gamer
lines.text: Well if your cat dies or it runs away you lose.

lines.speaker: Gamer
lines.text: So the longer it stays in the fight the better chance you have of winning.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Wow that sounds like fun!

lines.speaker: Gamer
lines.text: I don't know about that.

lines.speaker: Gamer
lines.text: One thing I know though is that it's a quick way to make and lose money.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Is there a limit to how much you can bet?

lines.speaker: Gamer
lines.text: Hmmm... let me think. I don't think that's ever arisen but I think it's 20,000.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hmm, that sounds like a silly amount of money to bet on a cat fight.

lines.speaker: Gamer
lines.text: You'd be surprised what some people would be willing to bet.

lines.speaker: Gamer
lines.text: There is a minimum bet of 100 coins too.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can I challenge you and your cat?

lines.speaker: Gamer
lines.text: No, not now, we don't really bet with outsiders.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: But I'm not an outsider, am I not inside in the pits now?

lines.speaker: Gamer
lines.text: I don't know, maybe once you've done something to win over my trust.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can it be bought?

lines.speaker: Gamer
lines.text: What?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Your trust.

lines.speaker: Gamer
lines.text: No. Regular townsfolk don't like us, which leads us to distrust them and anyone else.
